title: Amendment in the Composition of General Council
description: Amendment in the Composition of General Council
text: REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART III—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY NO. 303 ] NEW DELHI, TUESDAY. MAY 2, 2000/VAISAKHA 12,1922 GI/2000 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY Of SOCIAL JUSTICE AND EMPOWERMENT NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 2nd May, 2000 S. 0.426(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Sub-sections (1) and (3) of Section 3 of the Rehabilitation Council of India Act 1992 (No. 34 of 1992), the Central Government hereby appoints the following persons as members to the Rehabilitation Council of India and for that purpose makes the following amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment number S.O. 483 (E) dated the 3rd June, 1998, namely:— In the said notification, for serial numbers 19, 20 and 21 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and entries shall be substituted, namely :— "19. Shri Dina Nath Mishra Member Member of Parliament (Rajya Sabha) 20. Shri Haribhai Chaudhary Member Member of Parliament (Lok Sabha) 21. Shrimati Shyama Singh Member" Member of Parliament (Lok Sabha) [F. No. 25-1/98-DD-III] GAURI CHATTERJEE, Jt Secy. Note :—The Principal notification was published in the Gazette of India vide S. O. 483(E) dated the 3rd June, 1998 and 8th December, 1998. Printed by the Manager. Govt of India Press, Ring Road. Mayapuri. New Delhi-110064 -- 2 of 2 --
